text:
--- Page 1 ---
ANNEXURE-X 
         Undertaking (minimum local content) 
 
(TO BE SUBMITTED ON OEM/MANUFACTURER’S LETTER HEAD) 
 
Tender ID - GEM/2026/B/7319588 dated 05-03-2026. 
 
Certified by OEM 
 
I PURVI SHAH, Daughter of KAUSHIK SHAH, do solemnly affirm and state as 
under: 
That I am the AVP <> of INP Technologies Limited and I am duly 
authorized to furnish this undertaking declaration on behalf of INP 
Technologies Limited. That KJM Group System Solutions has submitted 
its bid no GEM/2026/B/7319588 dated 05-03-2026. against bidding 
document no. GEM/2026/B/7319588 dated 05-03-2026. for Entry and Mid 
Level Desktop Computer item / works for IOCL Haldia Refinery 
Project/Refinery of IOCL. 
That the Company is fully aware of the provision of Policy to Provide 
Purchase Preference w.r.t. PPP-MII order, 2017 and amendments / revisions 
thereof, enclosed in the above bidding document.  
We hereby confirm that our offer is achieving the minimum local content (LC) 
as mention below:- 
Item SL No / Schedule 
of tender 
Minimum % of Local Content 
in the quoted item 
Location wherein Local 
Content is being added 
Entry and Mid Level 
Desktop Computer 
50% 
C – 18, MIDC, Tarapur, 
Boisar, Palghar – 401506 
(NOTE - Bidder may add the rows as per number of tendered line items / Schedule) 
I confirm that I am aware of the implication of the above undertaking and our 
liability on account of wrong declaration. 
[Authorized signatory of supplier]  
 
Note:  
The undertaking shall be certified by the authorized signatory of the 
bidder, signing the bid.  
In case Bidder is Dealer/Trader/Distributor etc (i.e. not the OEM of the 
offered product), above Certification should be issued from OEM on their 
letter head as per Bid.
